login.title: Login - Vedic Astro
login.heading: Protected Access
login.intro: This app contains private stored charts and readings. Sign in with your own account to access only your saved birth data and readings.
login.session_hint: Session stays active in this browser until you log out.
login.firebase_enabled: Firebase auth is enabled for this deployment.
login.email_section: Or sign in with email and password
login.firebase_not_configured: Firebase auth is not configured for this deployment yet.

life_map.title: Life Map Reading
